title: Budget Implementation Act, 2001
description: Budget Implementation Act, 2001 (Budget Implementation Act, 2001). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Budget Implementation Act, 2001 .

provisions.chapter: Canadian Air Transport Security Authority Act
provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 2 The Canadian Air Transport Security Authority Act is enacted as follows: [See Canadian Air Transport Security Authority Act ]

provisions.title: Coming into force
provisions.content: 4 Sections 2 and 3 or any provisions of the Act enacted by section 2 come into force on a day or days to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council. Return to footnote * [Note: Sections 2 and 3 in force April 1, 2002, see SI/2002-63.]

provisions.title: Coming into force
provisions.content: 5 The Air Travellers Security Charge Act is enacted as follows: [See Air Travellers Security Charge Act ]

provisions.title: Coming into force
provisions.content: 11 This Part comes into force on the day on which it receives royal assent or is deemed to have come into force on April 1, 2002, whichever is the earlier. Return to footnote * [Note: Part 2 in force on assent March 27, 2002.]

provisions.title: Coming into force
provisions.content: 19 (1) Subject to subsection (2), the provisions of this Part or the provisions of any Act enacted by this Part come into force or are deemed to have come into force on a day or days to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council. (2) Despite section 153 of the Employment Insurance Act , section 16 comes into force on a day or days to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council. Return to footnote * [Note: Part 3, sections 12 to 18, in force April 17, 2002, see SI/2002-76.]

provisions.title: Section 16
provisions.content: 45 The Canada Fund for Africa Act is enacted as follows: [See Canada Fund for Africa Act ]

provisions.title: Coming into force
provisions.content: 46 The provisions enacted by section 45 come into force on a day or days to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council. Return to footnote * [Note: Sections 1 and 2, as enacted by section 45, in force April 12, 2002, see SI/2002-71; sections 3 to 5, as enacted by section 45, in force June 27, 2002, see SI/2002-101.]

provisions.title: Coming into force
